description: An advanced concepts aerodynamicist is researching a Box Wing (Joined Wing) transport aircraft. A baseline model has been prepared at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/box_wing_base.vsp3. Read the geometry specification document at /home/ga/Desktop/joined_wing_spec.txt. Open the baseline model in OpenVSP and add a new WingGeom component named 'Aft_Wing'. Use the XForm tab to position it at X=14.0, Z=2.5. Set its Span to 18.0, Root Chord to 1.5, and Tip Chord to 0.5. Apply a leading-edge Sweep of -28.0 degrees (forward sweep) and a Dihedral of -12.0 degrees (anhedral) to close the geometric loop with the forward wing. Finally, navigate to the Vehicle Reference dialog (Model -> Reference...), uncheck 'Extract from Wing', and manually set the global Vehicle Reference Area to 54.0 m^2 (representing the combined lifting area of both wings). Save the completed model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/box_wing_complete.vsp3.
